tasks.subject: Task 1: Backend month tracking (#30 part 1)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** EnergyTracker accumulates Heating/Cooling/Consumed-MonthKWh alongside today and lifetime, with calendar-month rollover (local TZ) parallel to date rollover. JSON snapshots and Prometheus gauges expose all three. UI is untouched.

**Files:**
- Modify: pkg/breezy/energy.go
- Modify: cmd/breezyd/energy_tracker.go (struct, persistedEnergy, Load, save, Snapshot, Tick)
- Modify: cmd/breezyd/metrics.go (struct fields, gauge registration, collectors slice, SetEnergy)
- Modify: cmd/breezyd/energy_tracker_test.go (2 new tests)
- Modify: cmd/breezyd/metrics_test.go (extend 2 tests)
- Modify: cmd/breezyd/server_test.go (extend TestHandler_GetDevice_IncludesEnergy)

**Acceptance Criteria:** see plan.

**Verify:** `just check && just test-ui` → both green.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["pkg/breezy/energy.go", "cmd/breezyd/energy_tracker.go", "cmd/breezyd/metrics.go", "cmd/breezyd/energy_tracker_test.go", "cmd/breezyd/metrics_test.go", "cmd/breezyd/server_test.go"], "verifyCommand": "just check && just test-ui", "acceptanceCriteria": ["EnergyValues struct extended with month fields", "persistedEnergy + EnergyTracker extended", "Load handles month rollover (incl. missing month_start)", "Tick rollover branch + accumulation in lockstep with lifetime", "Snapshot populates month fields", "3 new Prometheus gauges registered + set + cleared on Error", "Server test asserts month JSON round-trip", "Two new rollover tests pass", "just check passes", "Existing UI tests still pass"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Frontend rebuild + reposition (#30 part 2)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Dashboard ENERGY block renders as 5×3 grid with COP cells, immediately above Sensors. Existing energy tests replaced with new layout tests; new tests cover COP and DOM position. Depends on Task 1's new month JSON fields.

**Files:**
- Modify: cmd/breezyd/ui/index.html (renderCard call site, energyBody)
- Modify: tests/ui/dashboard.spec.ts (replace 3 + add 4 + extend open-state fixture)
- Modify: tests/ui/screenshot.ts (fixture extension)
- Regenerate: tests/ui/screenshots/dashboard-1col.png, dashboard-3col.png

**Acceptance Criteria:** see plan.

**Verify:** `just check && just test-ui` → both green.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["cmd/breezyd/ui/index.html", "tests/ui/dashboard.spec.ts", "tests/ui/screenshot.ts", "tests/ui/screenshots/dashboard-1col.png", "tests/ui/screenshots/dashboard-3col.png"], "verifyCommand": "just check && just test-ui", "acceptanceCriteria": ["renderEnergy moved above sensors block", "5×3 grid renders 15 cells with new labels", "regen power formatting (heating/cooling/zero)", "regen cost formatting", "COP formatting incl. — for divide-by-zero", "Position test: energy above sensors in DOM order", "Open-state-survives test still passes", "Error and hidden-when-missing paths unchanged", "Screenshot fixture extended with month fields", "Screenshots regenerated", "just check + test-ui green"]}
```
